cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out which option James Todd Wells is most likely to be hired by based on his experience. The options are a supermarket, hotel, hospital, or school. Looking at his experience section, he worked at the Hickingbotham Center in the Cardiovascular Rehabilitation Unit Admissions of Outpatient Services. His role there was admitting patients and acting as a liaison between family members and doctors. Then he also worked in the Emergency Room admissions, checking in patients and handling insurance verification. So, both of his job experiences are in medical settings—specifically in admissions and patient handling. Supermarkets and hotels typically don't have roles that involve patient admissions or working in medical units.
